reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Create insightful reports based on your collected data.
reports.selectPeriodAndCategories: Select time period and which categories to include in the report
reports.moodInsightStable: You have had a stable mood during {{percentage}}% of the period. That's a good sign of balance.
reports.moodInsightElevated: You experienced elevated mood {{percentage}}% of the time. Be aware of signs of hypomania.
reports.moodInsightDepressed: You have been depressed {{percentage}}% of the period. Consider talking to your doctor about this pattern.
reports.moodInsightVarying: Your mood has varied during the period. It may be worth looking closer at what factors are affecting it.
reports.sleepInsightGood: You have slept well {{percentage}}% of the nights. Keep up your good sleep routines!
reports.sleepInsightVarying: Your sleep has been varying. {{percentage}}% bad nights can affect your mood.
reports.sleepInsightBad: You have had sleep problems {{percentage}}% of the nights. Sleep is important for your health.
reports.eatingInsightGood: You have eaten well {{percentage}}% of the days. Well done!
reports.eatingInsightBad: You have had irregular eating habits. Regular meals can stabilize your mood.
reports.exerciseInsightGood: You have exercised {{percentage}}% of the days. Exercise is good for both body and mind!
reports.exerciseInsightBad: You have exercised {{percentage}}% of the days. Even short walks can make a difference.
reports.medInsightExcellent: Excellent! You have taken your medication {{percentage}}% of the days.
reports.medInsightGood: You have taken your medication {{percentage}}% of the days. Try to be more consistent.
reports.medInsightBad: You have missed medication often. Regular medication is important for your treatment.

forPatients.heroDesc: Take control of your wellbeing with a tool designed for you living with bipolar disorder.
forPatients.featuresTitle: Everything you need to feel better
forPatients.dailyCheckinDesc: Log your mood, sleep, diet and exercise in under a minute each day.
forPatients.visualizePatternsDesc: See trends and patterns in your mood over weeks, months and years.
forPatients.medicationTrackingDesc: Keep track of your medications and see how they affect your mood.
forPatients.chatWithDoctorDesc: Communicate securely with your healthcare provider directly in the app.
forPatients.shareOnTermsDesc: You decide which data is shared with your doctor and relatives.
forPatients.simpleSecureDesc: Intuitive design and bank-grade security for your peace of mind.
forPatients.step1Desc: Register for free and choose which categories to track (mood, sleep, diet, exercise, medication).
forPatients.step2Desc: Take a minute every day to log how you feel. It takes less time than brushing your teeth!
forPatients.step3Desc: See how your mood develops over time and identify triggers and positive factors.
forPatients.step4Desc: Invite your doctor and choose which data to share for better appointments.
forPatients.readyDesc: Create a free account and start logging your mood today.

forRelatives.heroDesc: Be a better support for your loved one by understanding how they feel — on their terms.
forRelatives.followMoodDesc: See how your loved one is feeling without having to ask every day.
forRelatives.generateReportsDesc: Create reports to discuss with healthcare providers.
forRelatives.ownNotesDesc: Add your own observations linked to specific dates.
forRelatives.stayUpdatedDesc: Get a sense of patterns and trends over time.
forRelatives.respectsPrivacyDesc: You only see the data your loved one has chosen to share.
forRelatives.supportRightDesc: Better understanding leads to better support.
forRelatives.weUnderstandP1: Being a relative of someone with bipolar disorder can be challenging. You want to help, but don't always know how — or don't want to be intrusive by constantly asking "how are you?".
forRelatives.weUnderstandP2: With this platform, your loved one can choose to share their mood with you. You get insight into how they're feeling without having to ask, and can be a better support when it really matters.
forRelatives.weUnderstandP3: You can also add your own notes — perhaps you noticed your loved one seemed sad during a call? These observations can be valuable for understanding patterns over time.
forRelatives.step1Desc: Register and indicate that you are a relative.
forRelatives.step2Title: Get invited or send a request
forRelatives.step2Desc: Your loved one can invite you, or you can send a request to them.
forRelatives.step3Desc: See the data they've chosen to share with you — mood, sleep, diet, exercise or medication.
forRelatives.step4Desc: Double-click on a date to add your own notes.
forRelatives.wantToSupport: Want to support your loved one?
forRelatives.wantToSupportDesc: Create a relative account today and take the first step towards better understanding.

aboutUsPage.heroDescription: We are a team passionate about making everyday life easier for people with bipolar disorder and their network.
aboutUsPage.missionP1: To give people with bipolar disorder the tools they need to understand and manage their well-being, while facilitating communication with caregivers and loved ones.
aboutUsPage.missionP2: We believe that transparency and insight lead to better health and quality of life.
aboutUsPage.careDesc: Every feature is designed with the user in focus
aboutUsPage.safetyDesc: Your data is protected and private
aboutUsPage.collaborationDesc: Built together with users and experts
aboutUsPage.focusDesc: Simplicity and usability at the center
aboutUsPage.storyP1: The idea for this platform was born from personal experience. As people who live with or close to someone with bipolar disorder, we understand the challenges of keeping track of well-being and communicating effectively with healthcare providers.
aboutUsPage.storyP2: We saw a need for a simple, beautiful tool that could help visualize patterns, track medications and share relevant information with the care team – all on the user's terms.
aboutUsPage.storyP3: Today we are proud to offer a platform used by users, doctors and loved ones to together create better conditions for good mental health.
aboutUsPage.ctaDescription: Create an account today and discover how we can help you.

partnersPage.heroDescription: Together we can make a bigger difference for people living with bipolar disorder.
partnersPage.healthcareOrgsDesc: Integrate the platform into your operations to give users better tools and you better insight.
partnersPage.researchInstitutesDesc: Use anonymized data to advance research in bipolar disorder.
partnersPage.userOrgsDesc: Offer your members a modern tool for managing their well-being.
partnersPage.sharedVisionDesc: We share the goal of improving life for people with bipolar disorder and their loved ones.
partnersPage.flexibleIntegrationsDesc: We adapt to your needs and can integrate with existing systems.
partnersPage.evidenceBasedDesc: Our platform is developed in collaboration with researchers and clinicians.
partnersPage.userFocusDesc: Everything we do starts from the user's needs and privacy.
partnersPage.partnersP1: We are always open to new collaborations and discussions about how we can together make a difference for people with bipolar disorder.
partnersPage.partnersP2: Contact us to discuss potential collaborations.
partnersPage.contactDescription: We'd love to hear from you. Tell us about your organization and how you think we can work together.

forRelativesPage.feat6Desc: Better understanding leads to better support.
forRelativesPage.understandP1: Being a relative of someone with bipolar disorder can be challenging. You want to help, but don't always know how – or don't want to be intrusive by constantly asking "how are you?".
forRelativesPage.understandP2: With this platform, your loved one can choose to share their well-being with you. You get insight into how they feel without having to ask, and can be a better support when it really matters.
forRelativesPage.understandP3: You can also add your own notes – maybe you noticed that your loved one seemed sad during a call? These observations can be valuable for understanding patterns over time.

badDayPage.neverForget: Never forget that there are people who are happy to listen to you
badDayPage.notAlone: You're not alone. Call when you need to.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyPage.s1Text: Toddy ("we", "us", "our") cares about your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data when you use our mood tracking service.
privacyPolicyPage.s2Intro: We collect the following types of data:
privacyPolicyPage.s2i1: Account information: Email address, name and profile information
privacyPolicyPage.s2i2: Health data: Mood registrations, sleep quality, eating habits, exercise and medication logs
privacyPolicyPage.s2i3: Diagnosis information: Information about diagnoses you choose to register
privacyPolicyPage.s2i4: Communication: Messages between you and your caregiver (if you enable this feature)
privacyPolicyPage.s2i5: Technical data: IP address, device type and usage patterns
privacyPolicyPage.s3i2: Generate personal insights about your well-being
privacyPolicyPage.s3i3: Enable data sharing with caregivers you approve
privacyPolicyPage.s3i4: Send reminders and notifications (if you enable this)
privacyPolicyPage.s3i5: Analyze usage patterns to improve the service
privacyPolicyPage.s4Intro: We only share your data in the following cases:
privacyPolicyPage.s4i1: With your consent: When you actively choose to share data with caregivers or relatives
privacyPolicyPage.s4i2: Service providers: With parties that help us run the service (e.g. cloud services)
privacyPolicyPage.s4i3: Legal requirements: If required by law or regulation
privacyPolicyPage.s4Footer: We never sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyPolicyPage.s5Text: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, secure authentication and regular security audits. All health data is stored within the EU in accordance with GDPR.
privacyPolicyPage.s6Intro: Under GDPR you have the right to:
privacyPolicyPage.s6i1: Request access to your personal data
privacyPolicyPage.s6i4: Object to processing of your data
privacyPolicyPage.s6i6: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacyPolicyPage.s7Text: We store your data as long as you have an active account. You can delete your account at any time via profile settings, which permanently removes all your data from our systems.
privacyPolicyPage.s8Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your personal data, contact us at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Text: By using Toddy ("the Service") you accept these terms of service. If you do not accept the terms, please refrain from using the Service. Toddy is provided by Toddy AB.
termsPage.s2Text: Toddy is a digital tool to help users follow and understand their well-being over time. The Service is designed as a complement to, not a replacement for, professional medical advice, diagnosis or treatment.
termsPage.s3Intro: Important: Toddy is not a medical service and does not replace professional care.
termsPage.s3i1: AI-generated insights are informational only and should not be considered medical advice
termsPage.s3i2: Always contact healthcare services for acute symptoms or deterioration of your well-being
termsPage.s3i3: In an emergency, call 112 or contact the nearest emergency department
termsPage.s3i4: Always consult your doctor before making changes to your medication
termsPage.s4Intro: To use the Service you need to create an account. You are responsible for:
termsPage.s4i3: Immediately notifying us of suspected unauthorized access
termsPage.s4i4: All activity that occurs through your account
termsPage.s5i1: Use the Service in accordance with applicable laws and these terms
termsPage.s5i2: Not share your account with others
termsPage.s5i3: Not attempt to manipulate or disrupt the Service's function
termsPage.s5i4: Not use the Service for illegal or harmful purposes
termsPage.s6Text: The Service offers the ability to share your data with caregivers and relatives. You have full control over what information is shared and can change or withdraw your consent at any time. Note that caregivers who receive your data have their own responsibility to handle it in accordance with applicable confidentiality legislation.
termsPage.s7Text: The Service and all content, including but not limited to design, logos, text and software, belongs to Toddy AB and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property rights. You may not copy, modify or distribute any of this without our written permission.
termsPage.s8Text: The Service is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted or meet all your needs. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect damages, consequential damages or lost data.
termsPage.s9Text: We reserve the right to update these terms. For material changes, we will notify you via email or through a notice in the Service. Continued use after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.s10Text: You can terminate your account at any time via profile settings. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
termsPage.s11Text: These terms are governed by Swedish law. Disputes arising in connection with these terms shall be settled by Swedish general courts.
termsPage.s12Text: If you have questions about these terms of service, contact us at:

medicationsPage.title: Medications

medicationsPage.name: Name
medicationsPage.asNeededDesc: Medications you take as needed – log when you take them

relativePatientConnections.requestAccessDesc: Enter the email of the person you want to follow to send a request.
relativePatientConnections.personCanApprove: The person will be able to approve or reject your request and choose which data you can see.

relativeReports.title: Reports
relativeReports.subtitle: Create reports for your close ones

relativeReports.needApproved: You need to have an approved connection to a relative to create reports.
relativeReports.createReportDesc: Choose relative, time period and which categories to include

diagnoses.searchHint: Start typing to see suggestions, or type your diagnosis and click add.

gdpr.description: Download all your data in compliance with GDPR. You can choose between JSON (machine-readable) or PDF (readable).
gdpr.exportDoneJSON: Your data has been downloaded as JSON.
gdpr.exportDonePDF: Your data has been downloaded as PDF.
gdpr.pdfAndMore: ... and {{count}} more (see JSON export for full data)

notificationSettings.reminderDesc: Get daily reminders to check in and take your medications

notificationSettings.blocked: You have blocked notifications. Change in your browser settings to enable reminders.
notificationSettings.notificationsEnabledBody: You will now receive reminders for check-ins and medications.
notificationSettings.dailyCheckinDesc: Remind me to log my mood
notificationSettings.medicationReminderDesc: Remind me to take my medications

overviewSummary.noDataYet: No data to show yet. Start checking in to see statistics.

overviewSummary.ofAllDays: of all your days you have felt stable.
overviewSummary.daysSinceDesc: Number of days since you were last in each state.
overviewSummary.avgEpisodeLengthDesc: How long does a period in each state last on average?

characteristics.characteristicsDesc: Learn your patterns — it helps you and your caregiver detect changes early.

relativeComment.placeholder: Write your observation about the day, e.g. 'Called and seemed sad' or 'Had a good day together'...
